[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 1101010010 5
3 1100001101 5
4 1100101100 5
5 0011011100 5
6 0000100100 2
7 0000000110 2

01 10 1100000000 2
12 21 1100001100 4
23 32 0000001100 2
34 43 0000000100 1
45 54 0000000100 1
56 65 0000000010 1
67 76 0001100000 2
70 07 0001000000 1

02 20 1100000000 2
13 31 0000001100 2
24 42 0000100100 2 match 6
35 53 0000000100 1
46 64 0000100000 1
57 75 0000000000 a match 0 1
60 06 0101010010 4
71 17 0000001000 1

03 30 0001010000 2
14 41 0000000100 1
25 52 0000000100 1
36 63 0001010000 2
47 74 0000100000 1
50 05 0000000010 1
61 16 0100000000 1
72 27 0000101000 2

15 51 0000000100 1
26 62 0100100000 2
37 73 0001001000 2
